name: aperture
description: Aperture — confidential payment + disclosure UI on top of MystenLabs/confidential-transfers (Contra). See CONVENTIONS.md for Forked/Modified/Built-new ledger.

scripts.build:move: bash -c 'command -v sui >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "✗ sui CLI not in PATH — install from https://github.com/MystenLabs/sui/releases (or cargo install sui) and re-run" >&2; exit 1; }; cd move && sui move build'
scripts.build:first-green: pnpm build:wasm && pnpm build:crypto && pnpm build:move
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @aperture/core test && pnpm --filter @aperture/spike test && pnpm --filter @aperture/sdk test:adapter-version && pnpm test:move
scripts.test:move: bash -c 'command -v sui >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "✗ sui CLI not in PATH — install from https://github.com/MystenLabs/sui/releases (or cargo install sui) and re-run" >&2; exit 1; }; cd move && sui move test'
